statements: Jamaica has the fastest sprinters in the world.
The Jamaican flag has red in it.
Usain Bolt is from Jamaica.
The capital of France is Paris.
The Earth is flat.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.
The game Minecraft lets you build houses.
Mario's brother is Luigi.
Fortnite was released in 1990.
The Mona Lisa was painted by Leonardo da Vinci.
The capital of Japan is Tokyo.
The largest mammal is the elephant.
In Apex Legends, you can use a grappling hook.
Call of Duty is a cooking game.
Valorant has agents with unique abilities.
In Among Us, you need to find the Impostor.
PUBG is a racing game.
League of Legends is a multiplayer online battle arena game.
The sun is a star.
Humans can breathe underwater without assistance.
Water covers over 70% of Earth's surface.
The PlayStation 5 was released in 2020.
Minecraft was created by Notch.
The Nintendo Switch can make phone calls.
The Eiffel Tower is in Paris.
Bananas grow on trees.
Australia is both a country and a continent.
Pikachu is an Electric-type Pokémon.
Super Mario can fly with a cape in some games.
Pac-Man was released in 2020.
Watermelons are mostly made of water.
Cats have six legs.
A group of lions is called a pride.
The Great Wall of China is visible from space.
Sharks are fish.
The human body has 206 bones.
PlayStation is a video game console.
The internet was invented in the 1800s.
The Amazon is the largest rainforest on Earth.
Spiders have eight legs.
Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level.
The moon is made of cheese.
Chocolate comes from cacao beans.
Dolphins are mammals.
Cows lay eggs.
Lightning never strikes the same place twice.
The Statue of Liberty is in New York.
Tomatoes are fruits.
